hero.title: Engineering Systems That Scale
hero.subtitle: Ngwanrọ ụlọ ọrụ · AI & Machine Learning · Akụrụngwa igwe ojii · IoT & Edge
hero.description: Site na akpaaka nwere ọgụgụ isi na nyiwe igwe ojii, anyị na-emepụta ma na-ewepụta teknụzụ nke na-eme ka azụmahịa dị oke egwu — n'oge, na mmefu ego, na ọnụ ọgụgụ.
hero.trustLine: Tụkwasịrị obi ụlọ ọrụ n'ụwa niile

services.subtitle: Ọrụ anyị
services.title: Injinia zuru oke
services.description: Mpaghara mmega ahụ isii. Otu ìgwè. Oyi akwa ọ bụla nke teknụzụ gị — site na ngwaọrụ ihu na dashboards ụlọ ọrụ.

customSoftware.title: Omenala Software Development
customSoftware.description: Ngwa nke oge a wuru na microservices, API, na igwe ojii.

aiMl.title: AI, ML na Business Intelligence
aiMl.description: Pipeline AI / ML, Power BI dashboards, na nchịkọta dị elu nke na-atụgharị data ka ọ bụrụ mkpebi.

cloud.title: Cloud Architecture & Infrastructure
cloud.description: Akụrụngwa igwe ojii dị iche iche na containers, serverless, na scalability zuru ụwa ọnụ wuru n'ime.

iot.title: IoT & Edge Computing
iot.description: Ngwaọrụ ejikọrọ, ejima dijitalụ, na mgbakọ ọnụ maka Industry 4.0.

devops.title: DevOps & Platform Engineering
devops.description: CI / CD pipelines, akụrụngwa dị ka koodu, na observability si nkwa na mmepụta.

digital.title: Mgbanwe Dijitalụ na Ndụmọdụ
digital.description: Teknụzụ teknụzụ, usoro ọgbara ọhụrụ, na ndụmọdụ aka.

cta.title: Ka anyị mepụta ihe dị mkpa.
cta.description: Site na mmepe ngwanrọ omenala na ngwọta AI kwadoro na akụrụngwa igwe ojii na akpaaka - anyị na-enye ọrụ teknụzụ njedebe na njedebe ahaziri maka mkpa gị.

credibility.subtitle: Ihe ndekọ anyị
credibility.title: Nsonaazụ ya, ọ bụghị <gradient>nkwa</gradient>
credibility.description: Site na Sarajevo ruo Oslo, Amsterdam, na Berlin. A na-enyefe usoro ụlọ ọrụ n'oge, oge ọ bụla.

atlascopco.label: Igwe ojii IAM maka Atlas Copco
atlascopco.outcome: Hazie akụrụngwa mbụ nke igwe ojii nke One Identity maka Atlas Copco na Azure Kubernetes, na-ebelata ụgwọ mgbe ị na-ejigide nnabata ụlọ ọrụ.

orange.label: Orange Cyberdefense Platform
orange.outcome: Mepụtara akụrụngwa Azure Kubernetes, pipelines CI / CD, na mwekota ServiceNow omenala maka ụlọ ọrụ cybersecurity na-eduga na Europe.

telecom.label: Telecom GIS & AR Platform
telecom.outcome: Wuru GIS n'elu ikpo okwu na-emepụta ihe ndị dị n'okpuru ala na Germany na nchọpụta nkwekọrịta na-egbochi mmebi akụrụngwa ọtụtụ nde Euro.

iot.label: Cloud IoT & Edge Platform
iot.outcome: Azure IoT Hub na-achịkwa ọtụtụ puku ngwaọrụ, Synapse na-ahazi ọtụtụ ijeri ahịrị telemetry, yana nchịkọta ọnụ na-ebelata ọnụ ahịa ozi site na ~ 90%.

drone.label: Autonomous Drone Platform
drone.outcome: Onye na-ahụ maka ụgbọ elu omenala na akwa 4G-to-Azure IoT Hub na-eme ka ụgbọ elu BVLOS kwụụrụ onwe ya maka nlekota oru ugbo na nnyefe ụgwọ.

payment.label: Ịkwụ Ụgwọ Usoro Nnapụta
payment.outcome: Zọpụta na-ada ada ugwo ọnụ ụzọ maka Norwegian mobile ngwa site reverse-engineering undocumented nketa koodu. Oge ịkwụ ụgwọ efu post-modernization.

game.label: AAA Game Dev Tooling
game.outcome: Wuru ngwa mgbakwunye Maya nke na-egbutu oge ngosi 3D na oge mmegharị site na 50% na nnukwu ụlọ ọrụ AAA, nakweere dị ka ngwá ọrụ ọkọlọtọ na pipeline mmepụta.

social.label: Ebe E Si Nweta Social Platform
social.outcome: Architected mkpakọrịta nwoke na nwaanyị ngwa maka Spain si nightlife idaha na geolocation kenkọtara, ezigbo oge ozi, na push ọkwa maka a UK ahịa.

iga.label: Multi-Tenant IGA Platform
iga.outcome: Wuru isi backend maka igwe ojii-native njirimara nchịkwa n'elu ikpo okwu na-eje ozi Fortune 500 ahịa na omenala ASP.NET Core Identity maka NoSQL na ụlọ ọrụ ụlọ ọrụ.

euAdjacent.title: EU-Adjacent, nnyefe zuru ụwa ọnụ
euAdjacent.description: CET na-arụ ọrụ awa na ahụmịhe na-agafe Norway, Netherlands, Germany, na karịa.

yourEngineers.title: Ndị na-ere ahịa gị, ọ bụghị onye na-ere ahịa
yourEngineers.description: Ndị otu raara onwe ha nye na-etinye aka na ọrụ gị na ngwaọrụ gị. Enweghị ndị njikwa akaụntụ, enweghị akara tiketi.

hardwareToCloud.title: Ngwaike na ígwé ojii
hardwareToCloud.description: Site na ngwa ngwa A na-ejikọta software zuru ezu n'ofe oyi akwa ọ bụla.

partners.subtitle: Teknụzụ Stack
partners.title: Agha a <gradient>nwalere Stack</gradient>
partners.description: Ọ bụghị naanị na anyị na-eji ngwaọrụ ndị a eme ihe, anyị na-ebuga usoro mmepụta na ha. Site na Microsoft Azure ruo Kubernetes, ndị injinia anyị na-ejide ezigbo ahụmịhe.

cloudInfra.label: Igwe ojii na akụrụngwa
cloudInfra.description: Multi-ígwé ojii architecture na akpa orchestration na akụrụngwa dị ka koodu.

frontend.label: Frontend
frontend.description: Modern akụrụngwa frameworks na ụdị nchekwa na kachasị ewu tooling.

backend.label: Backend & API
backend.description: Nyiwe ihe nkesa ụlọ ọrụ, asụsụ usoro, na paradigms API nke oge a.

data.label: Data na Nchekwa
data.description: Mmekọrịta, akwụkwọ, na ebe nchekwa na-echekwa na ọchụchọ ederede zuru ezu.

devops.label: DevOps & Tooling
devops.description: CI / CD pipelines, nsụgharị nsụgharị, na mmepụta mmepụta.

cloudNative.title: Igwe ojii na-agbanwe agbanwe site na ndabara
cloudNative.description: A na-arụ ọrụ ọ bụla, CI / CD-chụpụrụ, ma wuo ya maka ọnụ ọgụgụ kwụ ọtọ site n'ụbọchị otu.

fullStack.title: Full-Stack Fluency
fullStack.description: Site na React frontends na .NET microservices na Kubernetes ụyọkọ — otu otu, njedebe ruo ọgwụgwụ.

productionProven.title: Mmepụta-gosipụtara
productionProven.description: Ndị a abụghị teknụzụ demo. Ngwá ọrụ ọ bụla edepụtara na-eme ka ezigbo sistemụ na-ejere ezigbo ndị ọrụ ozi taa.

faq.subtitle: Ntọala ihe ọmụma
faq.title: <gradient>Ajụjụ</gradient> Ndị A Na-ajụkarị
faq.description: Ihe niile I Kwesịrị Ịma Banyere Ịrụ Ọrụ na Horizon Tech

scope.question: Kedu ihe bụ ọrụ gị?
scope.answer: Anyị na-ewepụta ọrụ teknụzụ njedebe na njedebe: ngwanrọ ụlọ ọrụ omenala, pipeline AI / ML, akụrụngwa igwe ojii, sistemụ IoT, akpaaka DevOps, na ndụmọdụ mgbanwe dijitalụ. Ma ịchọrọ ikpo okwu zuru oke nke e wuru site na ncha ma ọ bụ njikọta ezubere iche na nchịkọta gị dị ugbu a, anyị na-ejikwa ihe owuwu, mmepe, nnwale, na nnyefe.

stack.question: Kedu ihe bụ isi teknụzụ gị?
stack.answer: Isi nchịkọta anyị na-elekwasị anya na nyiwe ụlọ ọrụ: Azure na AWS maka igwe ojii, .NET na Node.js maka backend, React na Angular maka frontend, Kubernetes na Docker maka orchestration, na Terraform maka akụrụngwa dị ka koodu. Anyị na-arụkwa ọrụ nke ọma na Python maka ọrụ AI / ML, Power BI na Fabric maka ọgụgụ isi azụmahịa, na PostgreSQL, SQL Server, na MongoDB maka data.

enterprise.question: Kedu otu esi ejikwa ọrụ ụlọ ọrụ?
enterprise.answer: Njikọ ọ bụla na-amalite site na usoro nchọpụta iji kọwaa oke, ụkpụrụ ụlọ, na milestones. Ị ga-enweta ndị otu raara onwe ha nye na ndu teknụzụ, nyocha oge niile, na ịnweta ndị injinia na-ewu usoro gị. Anyị na-agbaso agile sprints na demos ndị metụtara ya, na-edebe bọọdụ ọrụ doro anya, ma na-enye akụkọ ọganihu kwa izu.

support.question: Kedu ihe nkwado post-mwepụta dị ka?
support.answer: Anyị na-enye ọkwa nkwado ahaziri ahazi na SLA akọwapụtara, gụnyere nlekota 24/7, nzaghachi ihe merenụ, njikarịcha arụmọrụ, na ntụgharị atụmatụ. Nkwekọrịta nkwado anyị na-ekpuchi ndozi ahụhụ, nchebe nchekwa, akụrụngwa akụrụngwa, na nyocha ahụike na-arụ ọrụ — ahaziri maka oge gị na oge nzaghachi.

integration.question: You nwere ike ijikọ akụrụngwa anyị dị ugbu a?
integration.answer: Kpamkpam. Anyị na-ahụ maka mmepe nke oge a, njikọta API-mbụ, na mbugharị igwe ojii ngwakọ. Ma ịchọrọ ijikọ na sistemụ ERP na-arụ ọrụ, kwaga site na monoliths gaa na microservices, ma ọ bụ jikọta ọdụ data nketa na frontends nke oge a, anyị nwere akwụkwọ egwuregwu mbugharị na ahụmịhe njikọta iji mee ka ọ bụrụ enweghị ntụpọ.

industries.question: Kedu ụlọ ọrụ ị rụrụ ọrụ?
industries.answer: Ndị otu anyị enyela ọrụ gafee fintech, ahụike, lọjistik, e-commerce, ike, na ngalaba gọọmentị. Anyị ghọtara ihe ụlọ ọrụ chọrọ dị ka PCI-DSS maka ịkwụ ụgwọ, echiche HIPAA maka data ahụike, nnabata GDPR maka ahịa EU, na telemetry oge maka ụlọ ọrụ IoT.

engagement.question: Kedu ka usoro ntinye aka si dị?
engagement.answer: Ọ na-amalite site na ịkpọ oku nchọpụta iji ghọta ihe mgbaru ọsọ gị na ọnọdụ teknụzụ. Site n'ebe ahụ, anyị na-ewepụta akwụkwọ nyocha na ndụmọdụ ụkpụrụ ụlọ, usoro iheomume, na mmebi ego. Ozugbo akwadoro, anyị na-amalite na ndị otu raara onwe ha nye, na-abanye n'ime ngwaọrụ gị na arụmọrụ gị, wee malite sprint mbụ n'ime ụbọchị.

faq.ctaDescription: Ị nwere atụmatụ ọ bụla n'uche? Ka anyị kwuo banyere oke, usoro iheomume, na mmefu ego.
